purpose: Source files to load into a future custom GPT/project knowledge base
status: Product observability v2 completed. MISIS_Digital Student Support now has product metrics by status/category/resource/priority, active ticket age metric, Grafana Product Observability v2 panels, cleaned alert rules, and improved Ansible Prometheus rules deploy readiness check.
